title: Blob storage: HTTP upload/download
description: Implement RFC 8620 §6 blob upload (POST uploadUrl) and download (GET downloadUrl) in nie-daemon. Store blobs locally with SHA-256 verification. Wire Attachment records into Message/set create. For outbound delivery to peers, fetch URL will be the local daemon's downloadUrl — peers fetch blobs over the JMAP blob channel rather than in-band chunked transfer. Supersedes ClearMessage.FileHeader/FileChunk for JMAP Chat clients.
close_reason: RFC 8620 §6 blob upload (POST /jmap/upload/{accountId}) and download (GET /jmap/download/{accountId}/{blobId}/{name}). SHA-256 content-addressed storage in SQLite. DB v3 migration. 4 integration tests.
